articles.title: Thailand’s Richest Man Plans $4.3 Billion Expansion Amid AI Boom
articles.description: Thailand’s richest man, Sarath Ratanavadi, plans to spend as much as 140 billion baht ($4.3 billion) through Gulf Development Pcl over the next five years to expand data centers and other infrastructure needed to support the artificial intelligence boom.

articles.title: Simba's parent company terminates deal to acquire M1
articles.description: Simba continues to cooperate with the Infocomm Media Development Authority's investigation into whether Simba had breached the Telecommunications Act, Tuas said.
articles.content:
SINGAPORE: Simba's owner, Australia's Tuas, announced on Friday (May 22) that the deal to acquire M1 has been terminated.
